name: Avocado with Shrimp Remoulade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine vinegar, mustard, catsup, paprika, salt, and cayenne pepper.
2. Slowly add oil, beating constantly with an electric mixer until emulsified.
3. Stir in celery and green onions.
4. Pour the sauce over shrimp.
5. Marinate for 4 to 5 hours in the refrigerator.
6. Halve and peel avocados.
7. Lift shrimp out of the sauce and arrange on each avocado half.
8. Serve with chilled asparagus, carrot strips, sliced beets, and hard-cooked eggs. This makes a good luncheon dish and can also be served with toothpicks as an appetizer.
